name: Publish To Hub
description: Prepare a model, dataset, or evaluation package for Hub publication with artifact inventory, metadata checks, card evidence, and approval points.

inputs.description: Local artifact directory, checkpoint, dataset export, or evaluation package to prepare.
Target repository id or planned namespace and name.
Repository type such as model, dataset, or space.
Planned repository visibility for publication review.

permissions.description: Read local package files, card drafts, metadata, license text, metrics, and artifact manifests.

approval_points.description: Confirm repository target, visibility, license, included artifacts, and known gaps.
Publish package artifacts, metadata, card content, or evaluation results outside the local workspace.

phases.name: Publication Scope
phases.objective: Capture repository target, artifact type, visibility, license, intended audience, and publication non-goals.

phases.name: Artifact Inventory
phases.objective: Inventory package files, config, model or dataset revisions, metrics, size-sensitive assets, and missing metadata.

phases.name: Card And Metadata
phases.objective: Review card content, metadata fields, tags, license, intended use, limitations, and metric evidence.

phases.name: Publication Readiness
phases.objective: Prepare upload manifest, final caveats, rollback notes, and evidence-backed publication decision.

required_outputs.description: Repository target, artifact type, visibility, license, audience, and non-goals.
Package files, sizes, revisions, config files, and included artifact classes.
Relevant config, environment, tokenizer, dataset, or evaluation metadata required for publication.
Repository README or card content ready for review.
Evaluation metrics, dataset or split references, and source evidence when available.
Publication decision, caveats, unresolved gaps, and approval notes.

artifacts.description: Planned files, paths, metadata, and publication disposition.
README.md or card content prepared for the repository.
Publication checks, approvals, caveats, and rollback notes.

verifiers.description: Repository target, artifact type, license, and publication scope are documented.
Relevant package environment, revisions, dependency metadata, and config context are captured.
Model, dataset, tokenizer, evaluation, or packaging config required to interpret the artifacts is captured.
Repository card includes intended use, limitations, artifacts, datasets, metrics, and license context.
Available metrics include task, dataset or split, value, and source reference.
Publication decision and card claims cite manifest, card metadata, metrics, configs, or explicit gaps.
